basic_details.job_title: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur has published the Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Faculty positions. Candidates with M.Sc./M.Tech. in the respective subject along with a minimum of two years teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed institutes are eligible to participate in the recruitment process. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification details and application information through the links provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech. in respective subject, Minimum two years teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed institutes, Ph.D. or IIT/NIT alumni preferred
qualification.details: Mathematics Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Mathematics with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IIT/NIT alumni. Physics Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Physics with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IIT/NIT alumni. Chemistry Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Chemistry with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IIT/NIT alumni.

Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty posts is scheduled for 22 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Faculty position at Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur, with one each for Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc./M.Tech. in the respective subject and have a minimum of two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation. Ph.D. or IIT/NIT alumni are preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Faculty positions will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with the required documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur office. The exact address and timing will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a government job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a government job notification from Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur, a government organization.
